prompt: I've got two trips to add to my calendar — a 4-day and a 4-day. Here are the skedplus files. Don't create events, just show me a preview of all events you would create for both trips.

assertions.text: Produces exactly 8 events total (4 from each file)
Jun 12 (E3436 Day 2) ends at 2307 GFK with 4 legs in notes
Jun 19 (E3412 Day 3) reports from GFK, location is Grand Forks International Airport
Summary table present at end listing all 8 events
